args.Description: "Core integration fixes: auto-load page builder on Pages tab, better empty state, sync theme/device changes to iframe, pass theme context to embedded page builder"
args.Instruction: "1. Update showTab to auto-trigger page builder loading when Pages tab is selected. 2. Update loadCustomizerPages to show a better empty state with auto-create Home page. 3. Fix selectCustomizerPage to pass theme/accent context to iframe. 4. Fix applyCustomizerTheme to forward theme changes to iframe. 5. Fix setStageDevice to forward device changes to iframe."
